title: M-AIDA: Meta-Analysis Intelligent Data Assistant
description: Research software for international-business meta-analysis: semi-automated effect-size extraction from academic PDFs with an LLM pipeline, a human-in-the-loop verification dashboard, and an immutable data-lock workflow that exports a reproducible effect-size dataset for three-level meta-analytic regression. Authored for the P6 component of the author's doctoral dissertation programme.

creators.name: Do, Thuy Huong
creators.affiliation: Vinh Long University of Technology Education; Can Tho University
